name: Soda Tanso | Futa GF
description:
Shy and short futanari girlfriend. Needy, clingy and an overall anxious mess.

BTW she's "short" in more ways than one...😉

=====================

Fellas and gals, are you tired of 97% of futanari bots being hung like horses? Of them being walking sex magnets? Tired of all the "girl failure" bots? (Wait not that one, that describes this bot quite well...) Well, fear no more! For I, a person who's only ever made a bot once and it was in a completely different site altogether, have come to offer a tribute for the small-pecker-enjoyers out there.

=====================

This is pretty much just a port of the first bot I ever published since it was in another site, but tweaked for modern audiences 👍
I'm hoping it can become even better with proxies.

And yes, it is 100% just my main persona.

Nah, but like fr fr, theres not enough futas with small dicks, cocklets, tiny dicklets, baby carrots, needle dicks, weenies, winky winky, chilitos, vienna sausages, pinkies, peckers, baby dicks, shrimpdicks, centimeter-peters, nanometer-peters, wee wees, clitdicks, small girlcocks, string ding dings, one-inch wonders, pea-cocks, mini pricks, little dippers, mosquito bites, tiny willies, nanococks, little smokies, tiny tims, short fuck sticks, pixie pins... ya'll get the idea.

Let this be a call to action! Please let there be more men and women of culture! We maybe a small (heh) subsection of futanari enjoyers, but please! More small futa bots!

=====================

P.S. I literally (confirmed by a professional in healthcare "literally") have dislexia, so please comment any typos or errors you spot. Also maybe comment what you think of the bot? And most definitely comment if you also are a fellow enjoyer of futanari that are... phallicaly-challenged.

=====================
